Location

Office Dubai; Bordeaux Remote; France Remote; Lille Remote; Lyon Remote; Marseille Remote; Montpellier Remote; Nantes Remote; Nice Remote; Office Lisbon; Rennes Remote; Strasbourg Remote; Toulouse Remote

Employment Type

Full time

Location Type

Hybrid

Department

Operations

OverviewApplication

Welcome to the PARADOX application form! We're thrilled to learn a bit more about you 🤩

Fill in thoroughly to make sure you stand out from the crowd ⭐

Paradox collects your personal data to process your application and possibly offer you an employment contract. It is intended only for the human resources department. In order to reach out for new opportunities, and unless you object to it, this information will be kept for a maximum of 2 years if your application is unsuccessful. For more information on the use of your data and your rights, please consult our privacy policy

FR: En cliquant sur "I accept", j'accepte que l'entreprise Paradox Group conserve mes données personnelles pendant une durée de 2 ans afin d'être recontacté.e pour de nouvelles opportunités.

Paradox collecte vos données personnelles pour traiter votre candidature et éventuellement vous proposer un contrat de travail. Elles sont destinées uniquement au département des ressources humaines. Dans le but de vous contacter pour de nouvelles opportunités, et sauf opposition de votre part, ces informations seront conservées pour une durée maximale de 2 ans si votre candidature n'est pas retenue. Pour plus d'informations sur l'utilisation de vos données et vos droits, veuillez consulter notre politique de confidentialité.

Please enter your first name

Please enter your last name

Double check before clicking on 🆗! We want to make sure you get our emails 🙏

Let's anticipate contract details so we can focus on you during the interviews!

Give us more information in this section.

Depending on the position, department, and location, we might need to issue a specific type of contract. Let us know all the options that you would be open to!

If you have 2 or more nationalities, please select just one of them for now. We’ll be able to discuss any relevant visa implications at a later stage.

If you're already full-remote: your "main country of residence" is where you pay your taxes 😉

This question is not used to discriminate any candidate, we are planning ahead the potential need for relocation to have you onboard ⛵

We'd like to know how you personally feel the most satisfied regarding remote options. You can pick up to two options!

Depending on the position and department, we might need to issue a contract from a specific country. It doesn't mean you will have to be 100% of the time at the office or that you won't be able to travel abroad! Usually, it implies having a residence there and being in the country 6 months per year.

We'd like to anticipate all possible options to work with you - if there is a need to relocate for the position you've applied to, we'll discuss it throughout the hiring process.

Pick all that apply to you in the following list, and you can add some more that are not in that list in the next question.

You can skip if you don't want to relocate or have already given all the options you're interested in.

This question is mostly theoretical for now but we'd like to anticipate options to work with you - if there is a need to relocate for the position you've applied to, we'll discuss it again throughout the hiring process. 

Pick all the options that may apply to you.

At Paradox, one of our values is to “Think deeper” so… ⛏️ Let’s dig deeper into your experience and skills!

A CV is not enough to gauge what you can bring to our mission! We want to know more 🤗

It’s not necessarily better if you knew us before! We want to know what is your knowledge of the company so far. 

🇫🇷 Please reply in French if you're bilingual or native 🇫🇷 

By "experience (...) in the field", we mean the total of years of experience you have in HR, marketing, sales, product, tech, customer support, finance, legal, etc. (depending on the offer you're applying for)

After you've asked for their consent to reach out, of course!

We conduct reference calls to get insights about how you work in different environments and gather tips on how to make your integration easier and help you succeed in your role.

In other words, what will make you a unique candidate for this position?

🇫🇷 Please reply in French if you're bilingual or native 🇫🇷 

By "field", we mean HR, marketing, sales, product, tech, customer support, finance, legal, etc. (depending on the offer you're applying for)

Tell us more about how frequently you learn new things and which type of content feeds your brain 🧠

🇫🇷 Please reply in French if you're bilingual or native 🇫🇷 

ℹ️ By digital tools, we mean emailing tools, file management tools, project management tools, task managers, CRMs, form builders, website builders, ads managers, etc.

You might need training under a specific level, so read the options carefully and make sure to give us your correct level ✅

You might need training if you haven't used a specific type of tools yet, so read the options carefully. 👀

Pick all that apply to you. 

You might need training if you don't have a specific skill, so read the options carefully and add any relevant one in "Other". 👀

Pick all that apply to you. 

ℹ️ Please select the level that best describes your current skills and experience.

You might need training under a specific level, so read the options carefully and make sure to give us your correct level ✅

Soft skills are a key success factor! Let us know which ones you're usually praised for.

Soft skills are a key success factor! Let us know which ones you're usually praised for.

✅ Please read read the options carefully and make sure to give us your correct level:

0 = you cannot speak English

1 = you can phrase basic sentences in English

2 = you can carry basic casual conversations, but might struggle to work in English

3 = you can carry out most work functions in English, but might struggle with vocabulary, accents or speech speed

4 = you can have advanced work discussions with ease, have extensive vocabulary, and might only make occasional minor mistakes

5 = your native language is English or you've reached bilingual level with close to no accent

✅ Please read read the options carefully and make sure to give us your correct level:

0 = you cannot speak French

1 = you can phrase basic sentences

2 = you can carry basic casual conversations, but might struggle to work in French

3 = you can carry out most work functions in French, but might struggle with vocabulary, accents or speech speed

4 = you can have advanced work discussions with ease, have extensive vocabulary, and might only make occasional minor mistakes

5 = your native language is French or you've reached bilingual level with close to no accent

I know we said a CV isn't enough... But we still need it 🫣

Final and last round, and then you're good to go!

Don't worry if you don't have a clean CV - you can just download the one on your Linkedin profile!

Linkedin is still useful to have a 360° view of your profile! You can go to your Linkedin app to copy-paste it if you're on your phone, it won't affect your form answers.

If you don’t have one, you can skip the question.

It’s not everything, but it’s a good start to showcase your experience! Upload your resume here. 👇

or drag and drop here

If not, you can just skip.

By relevant resource, we mean your main social network if you’re a Community Manager, your portfolio if you’re a Designer, your Github if you’re applying to a tech position, etc. 

It is often used at the later stages of the hiring process to communicate faster 📞
